title: hieracium basalticum
intro: Hieracium basalticum, also known as Devil's-bit scabious or Rattleweed, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a remedy for wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting digestion. In herbal preparations, Hieracium basalticum can be consumed as a tea, used in tinctures, or made into a salve for topical application.
